helpful: The provisioned petition and snapshot supplied the decisive posture and vehicle facts.
The statpack's paid-filing, zero-relist, and no-CVSG rates supported calibrated probability adjustments.
gaps: Corpus query cannot filter SCOTUS petitions by originating state court or a useful subject field, so the returned priors were weak analogues.
notes: The two five-result corpus queries required 346 ranged GETs and about 90.6 MB while providing little similarity value; the committed aggregate cuts were materially more useful.
